headline: Regency Centers Corp (NASDAQ:REG) Beats Q1 Estimates, Lifts Guidance Amid Leasing Momentum
summary: Regency Centers beats Q1 estimates, lifts 2026 guidance on strong leasing spreads and 4.4% NOI growth, with shares rising in after-market trading.

headline: Regency Centers: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. — JACKSONVILLE, Fla. — Regency Centers Corp. on Wednesday reported a key measure of profitability in its first quarter. The results did not meet Wall Street expectations. ...
